name: LOCKHEED MARTIN CO
summary: Lockheed Martin Corporation is a global aerospace, defense, security, and technology company. Headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland, Lockheed Martin engages in the research, design, development, manufacture, integration, and sustainment of advanced technology systems, products, and services. The company serves both domestic and international customers with products and services spanning the aerospace, defense, and information technology industries.
